targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, close as last_price, timestamp FROM market_data_hot ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC), prev AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, close as prev_close FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp < (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot) ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC) SELECT l.symbol, l.last_price as "Price", ROUND(((l.last_price - p.prev_close)/p.prev_close*100)::numeric, 2) as "Change %" FROM latest l JOIN prev p ON l.symbol=p.symbol WHERE p.prev_close > 0 ORDER BY "Change %" DESC LIMIT 10

WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, close as last_price, timestamp FROM market_data_hot ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC), prev AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, close as prev_close FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp < (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot) ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC) SELECT l.symbol, l.last_price as "Price", ROUND(((l.last_price - p.prev_close)/p.prev_close*100)::numeric, 2) as "Change %" FROM latest l JOIN prev p ON l.symbol=p.symbol WHERE p.prev_close > 0 ORDER BY "Change %" ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT symbol, SUM(volume) as "Volume" FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot) GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY "Volume" DESC LIMIT 10

WITH base AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, close as base_price FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY symbol, timestamp ASC) SELECT m.timestamp as time, m.symbol, ROUND(((m.close - b.base_price)/b.base_price*100)::numeric, 2) as "Change %" FROM market_data_hot m JOIN base b ON m.symbol=b.symbol WHERE $__timeFilter(m.timestamp) ORDER BY m.timestamp

WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, close FROM market_data_hot ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC), prev AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, close as prev_close FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp < (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot) ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE l.close > p.prev_close) as "Advancing" FROM latest l JOIN prev p ON l.symbol=p.symbol

WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, close FROM market_data_hot ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC), prev AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol, close as prev_close FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp < (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot) ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE l.close < p.prev_close) as "Declining" FROM latest l JOIN prev p ON l.symbol=p.symbol
SELECT SUM(volume) as "Total Volume" FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) as "Symbols" FROM market_data_hot WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT date_trunc('day', MAX(timestamp)) FROM market_data_hot)
